mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_safety_work_task_list ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_safety_work_task_list WHERE safety_work_id = #{safetyWorkId} ORDER BY task_date ASC, created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_safety_work_task_list (safety_task_id, safety_work_id, task_date, task_time, description, detail, comment, worker_count, attendee_count, permit_status, education_status, author_name, author_mail, author_dept, author_company, status, reject_comment, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{safetyTaskId}, #{safetyWorkId}, #{taskDate}, #{taskTime}, #{description}, #{detail}, #{comment}, #{workerCount}, #{attendeeCount}, #{permitStatus}, #{educationStatus}, #{authorName}, #{authorMail}, #{authorDept}, #{authorCompany}, #{status}, #{rejectComment}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_safety_work_task_list SET task_date = #{taskDate}, task_time = #{taskTime}, description = #{description}, detail = #{detail}, comment = #{comment}, worker_count = #{workerCount}, attendee_count = #{attendeeCount}, permit_status = #{permitStatus}, education_status = #{educationStatus}, author_name = #{authorName}, author_mail = #{authorMail}, author_dept = #{authorDept}, author_company = #{authorCompany}, status = #{status}, reject_comment = #{rejectComment}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
